description: Spotify is a music, podcast, and audiobook streaming platform. It also provides developer products for app integrations, playback control, advertising workflows, partner account linking, and embeddable content.
summary: Spotify exposes multiple developer-facing HTTP surfaces: the OAuth-protected Web API, Ads API, Open Access API, and Web Playback SDK, plus a public oEmbed API; no first-party GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
